_meta.notes: Discovery-only sweep, all rows live-fetched with UmkreisBot/0.1 UA, robots.txt read and honored per host. Backbone (München proper) weighted heavily per brief: official city calendar (muenchen.de, Drupal + schema.org microdata — no JSON-LD/ICS/RSS), municipal library (muenchner-stadtbibliothek.de, TYPO3, 901 events), and two family/kids editorial publishers (muenchenmitkind.de, eintrittfrei-muenchen.de). Ring: 13 towns probed (Dachau, Freising, Erding, Fürstenfeldbruck, Starnberg, Germering, Unterschleißheim, Garching, Ismaning, Wolfratshausen, Ebersberg, Gauting, plus kid-dachau.de as a family bonus) — NOT exhaustive, a characterization sample. Biggest structural finding: 'RCE-Events' (img-cdn.rce-event.de / rce_wrapper markup on TYPO3) is a white-label Bavarian regional-calendar vendor seen at 5 of 13 ring towns; only tenants hosted on their OWN subdomain (Freising, and presumably Dachau's Landkreis instance) are crawlable — 3 others (Fürstenfeldbruck, Wolfratshausen, Germering) embed it via an iframe to the shared host www.rce-event.de, whose robots.txt disallows everything except /veranstaltungen/, blocking /output.php outright. München's own open-data portal (opendata.muenchen.de) has no events dataset (checked CKAN package_search — only visitor-count statistics exist) and additionally disallows /api/ in robots.txt regardless. München Tourismus (muenchen.travel / munich.travel) is fully Cloudflare-blocked (403 'Attention Required') on every path tried.

proposed.name: muenchen.de Veranstaltungskalender – Familie & Kinder
proposed.notes: Official Landeshauptstadt München / muenchen.de city portal (Drupal). Live-verified 2026-07-16: 100 events on page 1 alone, marked up as schema.org Event MICRODATA (itemtype="https://schema.org/Event", itemprop name/startDate/endDate/location/url) — not JSON-LD/ICS/RSS, so structuredSignals() won't flag it; a dedicated microdata parser would be near-zero-cost vs LLM. Paginated (?page=0..6+, 700+ family events total across pages). robots.txt (Drupal default) does not disallow /veranstaltungen*, no Crawl-delay specified.

proposed.name: muenchen.de Veranstaltungskalender – Feste & Festivals
proposed.notes: Same Drupal portal + schema.org microdata pattern as familie-kinder (identical markup, itemtype=Event). Live-verified 2026-07-16: 100 events on page 1, paginated. Registered as a second category to confirm the pattern is systemic across the portal — 11 more category URLs exist under /veranstaltungen/event/ (ausstellung-museen, freizeit, klassik, konzerte, lesungen, messen, musical, oper-operette, sport, theater, nach-monaten) with the same markup, not individually fetched here to stay inside the request budget.

proposed.name: München mit Kind – Veranstaltungskalender (HIMBEER Verlag)
proposed.notes: Editorial family/kids events portal for München + Umland, run by Himbeer Verlag. WordPress + Events Manager plugin (em-event/em-list-header/em-events-search markup — NOT currently in ADAPTER_CANDIDATES; worth adding as 'wp-events-manager'). Live-verified 2026-07-16: 18 real events server-rendered with title/venue/time/age-tag/description, all dated the fetch day (16.07.2026) — the page appears to default to a 'today' view. A von/bis GET date-range param exists on the search form but returned garbled 2015–2016 dates when tested (?von=16.07.2026&bis=16.08.2026) — unreliable, flagged for developer follow-up rather than used. robots.txt (Allow all except /wp-admin/) permits.

proposed.name: Münchner Stadtbibliothek – Veranstaltungen
proposed.notes: Official municipal library system (32 branches). TYPO3 with a bespoke 'msb-theme' extension. Live-verified 2026-07-16: page states "10 von 901 Treffer" — 901 events total, server-rendered 10-per-page (?page=N), dates in DD.MM.YYYY format, includes a 'Kinder' (children) Zielgruppe filter. No JSON-LD/ICS/RSS found — LLM route. robots.txt allows (typo3conf/ext explicitly allowed, only /t3lib/ /typo3/ /typo3conf/ disallowed).

proposed.name: Eintritt.Frei München – Kategorie Kinder
proposed.notes: Editorial calendar of free/low-cost München events (WordPress). Live-verified 2026-07-16: 6 clean schema.org/Event JSON-LD blocks in the Kinder category alone, all fields populated (name/startDate/location.name/url) — e.g. 'ORCHESTER ZUM ANFASSEN' 2026-07-19, 'Mammut, Stein & Feuerschein: Gemeinsam auf Steinzeitreise' 2026-07-19, 'Märchen im Westpark' 2026-08-01. The cleanest structured feed found on this whole sweep. robots.txt: Allow: /.

proposed.name: Landkreis Freising Veranstaltungskalender (RCE-Events)
proposed.notes: TYPO3 site running the 'RCE-Events' white-label calendar (rce_wrapper / .eventlist / .datum / .location / .city / .title markup; images from img-cdn.rce-event.de). Live-verified 2026-07-16: 12 events on page 1 with venue, date range, description, and detail links; pagination confirmed to at least page 3. robots.txt (own subdomain, identical text on 3+ RCE tenant hosts) allows this path. STRONG ADAPTER CANDIDATE — but see rejected entries: the SAME vendor is embedded via iframe to www.rce-event.de/output.php by Fürstenfeldbruck, Wolfratshausen and Germering, and THAT shared host's robots.txt (Disallow: / ; Allow: /veranstaltungen/) blocks /output.php — so an adapter must check per-tenant-subdomain vs shared-host deployment before trusting robots at the vendor level.

proposed.name: Stadt Erding – Veranstaltungen
proposed.notes: Contao CMS, using Contao's own built-in calendar module (mod_eventlist_v3 — matches the existing 'contao' ADAPTER_CANDIDATES entry). robots.txt allows (only /contao/ /_contao/ admin disallowed). Live-verified 2026-07-16: 2 real events server-rendered with the mod_eventlist_v3 wrapper; this may be a homepage teaser rather than the full calendar — a developer should check whether Contao's calendar module exposes a fuller listing/detail page before committing to this exact URL long-term.

proposed.name: Stadt Starnberg – Veranstaltungskalender
proposed.notes: TYPO3 with a bespoke 'tx_starnbergevent' extension (single-instance, not a reusable adapter target). Live-verified 2026-07-16: 12 events server-rendered (.vak-box/.vak-date/.vak-cat/.headline markup) with real titles/venues/times, e.g. 'Das Lochmannhaus' at Museum Starnberger See, 11:00–18:00. robots.txt allows (typo3conf/ext explicitly allowed).
proposed.register_reason: Measured 2026-07-17: 8,670 chars of static HTML with 0 date strings and 0 structured data — no event data on the page at all. 0-yield trap.

proposed.name: Gemeinde Ismaning – Veranstaltungen (Kultur & Freizeit)
proposed.notes: WordPress. Live-verified 2026-07-16: 10 clean schema.org/Event JSON-LD blocks, all fields populated — e.g. 'Künstlergespräch mit Eduardo Palomares' (Kallmann-Museum) 2026-07-19, 'Kindernachmittag "Riech mal! Ismaning mit der Nase erkunden"' (Schlossmuseum Ismaning) 2026-07-19. Best-structured ring-town source found. robots.txt is empty (no restrictions declared).

rejected.name: München Tourismus (muenchen.travel / munich.travel)
rejected.note: Cloudflare 'Attention Required' 403 on both the German (/rubriken/planen/veranstaltungskalender) and English (/en/veranstaltungskalender at munich.travel) event-calendar paths, 2026-07-16 — not a robots.txt disallow, a live challenge page.

rejected.name: Open Data Portal München (opendata.muenchen.de)
rejected.note: CKAN package_search for 'veranstaltung' returned only 3 statistical datasets (monthly Kino/Theater/Orchester visitor counts) — no events dataset exists. Also, robots.txt disallows /api/ site-wide (Crawl-Delay: 10), so even a future dataset's API would be off-limits; only /dataset/ HTML pages are crawlable.

rejected.name: veranstaltungen.muenchen.de
rejected.note: This is the city's internal event-REGISTRATION platform (Referat für Informations- und Telekommunikationstechnik) for organizing municipal events/room bookings, not a public events calendar — wrong kind of source entirely. Its robots.txt explicitly blocks GPTBot and separately disallows /stadtbibliothek/ 'auf expliziten Wunsch des Fachbereichs' (explicit department request).

rejected.name: Kindaling München
rejected.note: Commercial marketplace for paid kids' courses/activities (page dataLayer tags itself 'RegCatHub'; site has /tickets /providers /account paths) — a booking aggregator, not a facts+linkback editorial/municipal calendar. Excluded per the no-aggregators rule.

rejected.name: IN München – Tipps für Kids / Veranstaltungen
rejected.note: WordPress magazine tag page; dates found (2025-02 through 2025-12) are article PUBLISH dates, not event dates. The separate /veranstaltungen listing page (also checked) has no JSON-LD/ICS/RSS and no repeating dated-card structure found within inspection budget — could not confirm a reliable events listing on either URL.

rejected.name: Stadt Fürstenfeldbruck – Veranstaltungskalender
rejected.note: Domino (.nsf) page whose only content is <iframe src="https://www.rce-event.de/output.php?id=827&mode=L">. www.rce-event.de/robots.txt is 'Disallow: / ; Allow: /veranstaltungen/', so /output.php is blocked at the shared RCE host even though fuerstenfeldbruck.de's own robots.txt permits crawling.

rejected.name: Stadt Wolfratshausen – Veranstaltungskalender
rejected.note: Same RCE-Events iframe pattern: embeds https://www.rce-event.de/output.php?id=1298&mode=L, blocked by rce-event.de's robots.txt (Disallow: / except /veranstaltungen/).

rejected.name: Stadt Germering – Veranstaltungskalender
rejected.note: Domino (.nsf) page that JS-injects an iframe to https://www.rce-event.de/output.php?id=1156&gk=9179123&ortbez=Germering, blocked by the same shared-host robots.txt. The Domino shell itself carries no event text server-side (0 dates found).

rejected.name: Landkreis Dachau Veranstaltungskalender (RCE-Events)
rejected.note: Same RCE-Events platform as the working Freising instance (identical robots.txt, own subdomain, crawl-permitted) — but both /region/ and /dachau/ paths returned 0 '.eventlist' rows on live fetch 2026-07-16. Likely needs a different city-slug path; not registered without a verified non-zero fetch.

rejected.name: Stadt Dachau – Veranstaltungskalender
rejected.note: WordPress + Elementor/JetEngine widget ('event-alt-item', 10 items), but the only dates found in server HTML were 2025-04-26 and 2026-04-20 — stale relative to the 2026-07-16 probe date. JetEngine's own data-pages="0" attribute suggests the full list loads via AJAX, not server-rendered.

rejected.name: KID Dachau – Kinder- und Familienkalender
rejected.note: Server HTML strips to ~3.9KB, almost entirely @font-face CSS plus the page title; no dated event content, no JSON-LD/ICS found. No recognized SPA framework marker, but functionally empty without JS execution.

rejected.name: Stadt Unterschleißheim – Veranstaltungskalender
rejected.note: HTTP 401 Unauthorized on two separate direct-fetch attempts, 2026-07-16, with the declared UmkreisBot UA. Not a robots.txt disallow (robots.txt only blocks /el/) — reads as active bot/WAF blocking of non-browser requests.

rejected.name: Stadt Garching – Veranstaltungen
rejected.note: HTTP 503 'Service Temporarily Unavailable' (nginx) on both / and /robots.txt across two attempts several seconds apart, 2026-07-16. Could be a genuine outage or an active block on non-browser UAs; politeness rules out repeated probing to distinguish the two. Worth a retry on a later date.

rejected.name: Gemeinde Gauting – Veranstaltungskalender
rejected.note: TYPO3 page fetched successfully (200, ~253KB) but no dated event markup or event-related CSS classes found anywhere in the server HTML — likely an external widget or JS-loaded calendar not visible to a plain fetch.

rejected.name: Stadt Ebersberg – Ebersberger Kalender
rejected.note: TYPO3 page fetched successfully (200, ~925KB) but no ISO or German-format dates and no event-class markup found anywhere in the server HTML within inspection budget.
